title: A Small Town Idol
writer: John Grey, Raymond Griffith, Mack Sennett
actors: Ben Turpin, James Finlayson, Phyllis Haver
plot: Sam, a young man in a small town, is accused of being a thief. Unable to prove his innocence--and not knowing that he's being framed by a local villain to keep him away from pretty young Mary, the town beauty whom the villain want...
